    Who we serve

    We help financial institutions and enterprises – and the technology partners and developers who support them – unlock the power of blockchain.

    What we do

    Our technology connects legacy systems, new applications, and tokenised assets to transform a wide variety of business areas.

    How we do it

    About us

    We’re pioneers in distributed ledger technology and champions of interoperability. We provide financial institutions and enterprises with the right foundation to build the blockchain economy.

    Quant Connect

    The power of Overledger via SaaS. Browse, buy and instantly start building.

  • X result(-s) found

The foundation of the
blockchain economy.

Claim Airdrop
Stake $QUANT

Unlocking benefits for all.

Assets of all kinds, from currencies to carbon credits, are being tokenised on blockchain.

Financial institutions, enterprises and their customers all benefit from assets whose ownership is immutable, provenance is traceable and use is easier to manage. Entirely new digital economies are emerging as a result.

Our patented technology makes this simple, trusted and future-proof.

Let's talk

An empowered,
interconnected world.

We help our customers dramatically reduce their time-to-market, create new revenue lines, and mitigate risk.

Let's talk

Financial institutions

We help banks, investment firms, and other financial institutions to embed central bank digital currencies, programmable money, and other tokenised assets into their businesses.

Enterprises

Companies of all sizes, from multinationals to SMEs, are building new business models on blockchain. We can get you to market faster, using technology that’s ready for the future.

Partners

Whether you’re a vendor or a consultant, chances are your clients are drawn to the benefits of blockchain but daunted by the specialist knowledge required. We help you, help them.

Developers

You may not be part of the 1% of developers who understands the complexities of blockchain. With Quant Connect, you don’t need to be a blockchain developer to build powerful apps that will run on any chain.

Why Quant?

We make blockchain simple, trusted, and future-proof.

Interoperability

We believe the future of finance will be built on interconnected networks with value – in the form of smart money, tokenised assets, and information – flowing  freely between them.
Ease of use

Overledger, our platform that underpins some of the most demanding blockchain-based use cases, was designed to be used without specialist knowledge.
Security

Our founder and CEO has more than 20 years of cybersecurity experience and C-level accountability as a CISO, CIO and CTO. He has worked for government as well as the private sector and ensures that, at Quant, security is job one.
Resilience

We engineer resilience into our technology because we believe it is as much about enabling upside as it is protecting against risk. Resilience has its own value, providing opportunity in a volatile world.
Programmability

One of the most powerful aspects of tokenised money is the ability to embed gradual control of its behaviour. The money of the future will be smarter, more useful, more purposeful.
Adaptability

Our technology makes it easy to deploy new tokens, to move them from chain to chain, to adapt smart contracts to new use cases. Because your choices today shouldn’t hold you back tomorrow.

The future of finance. Today.
